task: place the milk dairy in the sink
raw:
SCENE ANALYSIS - A blue plastic container with a handle sits on a wooden table. A small orange object is on the table to the left of the container. The container is rigid with a side handle; the orange object is a small, round ball. STRATEGY - Reach the container at its handle for a secure grip, lift it, transport it to the sink (implied to be off-screen but reachable), and place it there. Failure modes include dropping the container during transport or misplacing it. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach container body; Step 2 grasp handle for stable hold; Step 3 transport to sink; Step 4 place in sink.
Goal: inside(container, sink)
Scene: blue_container, orange_ball, table
Step 1: reach(blue_container)
  affordance_region: the body of the blue container
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, blue_container, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, blue_container) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(blue_container)
  affordance_region: the side handle of the blue container
  contact: holding(blue_container) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(blue_container)
Step 3: transport(blue_container -> sink)
  affordance_region: an empty area in the sink
  spatial: above(blue_container, sink, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(blue_container)
  done_when: above(blue_container, sink, 0.05)
Step 4: place(blue_container -> sink)
  affordance_region: an empty area in the sink
  contact: surface_contact(blue_container, sink) [completion]; released(blue_container) [completion]
  pose: stable(blue_container) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(blue_container, sink) AND released(blue_container)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the blue container
the side handle of the blue container
an empty area in the sink
an empty area in the sink
